title: Policy: Policy Applied - Settings Locked
scenario: Lens Cloud policy locks device settings in Poly Studio Mobile app, showing locked dialog and updating values when policy changes
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the device is connected to a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2).
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Verify that all settings (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) are editable and not greyed out initially.
5. On the Lens Cloud tenant, create a policy that affects one or more device settings (e.g., disable ANC, set Transparency Mode to Off).
6. Apply the policy to the user/device.
7. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name].
8. Observe the settings affected by the policy: they should appear greyed out/locked.
9. Tap on a locked setting (e.g., ANC).
11. On the Lens Cloud tenant, update the policy with new values for the same settings (e.g., change ANC from Off to Transparency Mode).
12. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name].
13. Observe that the locked settings now reflect the updated policy values but remain greyed out/locked.
14. On the Lens Cloud tenant, create a policy that affects all available settings in the app.
15. Apply the policy to the user/device.
16. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name].
17. Observe that all settings are now locked and display the policy-defined values.
expected: Settings affected by the Lens Cloud policy are greyed out/locked in the Poly Studio Mobile app. Tapping a locked setting shows a dialog informing the user that the setting is locked. When the policy is updated, the locked settings update to the new values but remain locked. When a policy affects all settings, all settings are locked with policy-defined values.
